prompt: Wir haben gerade ein Design fuer ein Benutzer-Login-System besprochen und abgenommen. Die Anforderungen sind: Benutzer koennen sich mit Email und Passwort anmelden, nach 3 Fehlversuchen wird das Konto gesperrt, es gibt eine Passwort-vergessen Funktion per Email. Erstelle bitte die Feature Files dafuer.

assertions.name: skill_triggered
assertions.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool

assertions.name: gherkin_syntax
assertions.text: Output contains valid Gherkin syntax with Feature:, Scenario:, Given, When, Then keywords

assertions.name: login_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for successful login with email and password exists

assertions.name: lockout_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for account lockout after 3 failed attempts exists

assertions.name: password_reset_scenario
assertions.text: A scenario for password reset via email exists

assertions.name: error_cases
assertions.text: At least one error/edge case scenario exists

assertions.name: declarative_style
assertions.text: Scenarios use declarative style - no CSS selectors, no HTTP verbs, no UI implementation details

assertions.name: feature_file_created
assertions.text: At least one .feature file was written to the filesystem
